name: voice-runtime-preflight-fragment
description: Reusable fragment: verify the local voice runtime bridges are present and, when provided, the reference sample directory contains usable audio files before starting a voice learning or cloning flow.

context.preflight_cmd: pnpm service:preflight -- --service voice && python_bin="{{python_bin}}"; if [ -z "$python_bin" ]; then python_bin=python3; fi; command -v "$python_bin" >/dev/null && test -f libs/actuators/voice-actuator/scripts/voice_learning_bridge.py && test -f libs/actuators/voice-actuator/scripts/zero_shot_bridge.py && test -f libs/actuators/voice-actuator/scripts/record_bridge.py && if [ -n "{{sample_path}}" ]; then test -f "{{sample_path}}"; fi && if [ -n "{{sample_dir}}" ]; then test -d "{{sample_dir}}" && find "{{sample_dir}}" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*.wav' -o -name '*.mp3' \) | grep -q .; fi && echo ok
